Dates

Information
Brief

Test bench wrapper for cocotb

tb_cocotb
module tb_cocotb #(
parameter 
BUS_WIDTH
 = 
8
)
(
input
clk,
input
rstn,
input
timeout,
input
enable,
output
m_data_tvalid,
input
m_data_tready,
output
 [BUS_WIDTH-1:0] 
m_data_tdata,
output
m_data_tlast,
input
s_data_tvalid,
output
s_data_tready,
input
 [BUS_WIDTH-1:0] 
s_data_tdata,
input
s_data_tlast
)

Hold data till ready

Parametes
BUS_WIDTH

width of the parallel data input in bits.

Ports
clk
input

global clock for the core.

rstn
input

negative syncronus reset to clk.

s_data

Input data that is BUS_WIDTH bits wide.

s_data_valid

Input data is valid when 1 (high).

s_data_ready

Core is ready for input data when 1 (high).

m_data

Output data that is BUS_WIDTH bits wide.

m_data_valid

Output data is valid when 1 (high).

m_data_ready

Core is ready to output data when 1 (high).

Instantiated Modules
dut

Device under test, holdbuffer
